ACME CORPORATION
1200 Innovation Drive, Suite 400
Sacramento, CA 95814

November 3, 2025

David Johnson
4521 Oak Valley Road
Sacramento, CA 95822

Dear David,

RE: Notice of Position Elimination

This letter is to inform you that your position of Senior Engineer in the
Engineering Department has been eliminated effective November 15, 2025, as
part of a company-wide restructuring initiative.

This decision is not a reflection of your performance. Your contributions
to Acme Corporation over the past five years have been valued by the
organization.

SEPARATION TERMS:
- Last day of employment: November 15, 2025
- Severance: 4 weeks base salary ($15,384.62)
- Benefits continuation: COBRA eligibility for 18 months
- Accrued PTO payout: 80 hours ($5,961.54)
- Company equipment: Return laptop and badge by last day

Please review the enclosed Separation Agreement and General Release. You
have 21 days to consider the agreement and 7 days to revoke after signing.

We wish you the best in your future endeavors.

Sincerely,

Sarah Chen
Director of Human Resources
Acme Corporation

Encl: Separation Agreement and General Release
cc: Robert Williams, VP Engineering
